column1: 宿題をしなくて、先生に怒られた。
column2: しゅくだいをしなくて、せんせいにおこられた。
column3: Because I didn't do my homework, I was scolded by the teacher.
column6: not doing V leads to a consequence (cause → effect)
column8: なくて (causal) = ないで + consequence; ないで alone = without doing (manner)
column10: module:02-n4 jlpt:n4 point:なくて-conjunction complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top1k

column1: 友達が来なくて、一人で映画を見た。
column2: ともだちがこなくて、ひとりでえいがをみた。
column3: My friend didn't come so I watched the movie alone.
column6: absence of expected event leads to different outcome
column8: なくて expresses that the non-occurrence of A caused B
column10: module:02-n4 jlpt:n4 point:なくて-conjunction complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top10k

column1: お金がなくて、旅行をあきらめた。
column2: おかねがなくて、りょこうをあきらめた。
column3: Because I had no money, I gave up on the trip.
column5: Adj-なくて / Noun-でなくて + result
column6: lack of something causes consequential action
column8: い-adj → くなくて; な-adj → でなくて; N → でなくて
column10: module:02-n4 jlpt:n4 point:なくて-conjunction complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top10k

column1: 天気が良くなくて、ピクニックが中止になった。
column2: てんきがよくなくて、ぴくにっくがちゅうしになった。
column3: Because the weather wasn't good, the picnic was cancelled.
column6: negative adjective state leads to an outcome
column8: good → good だ → よくない → よくなくて; regular い-adj negative て-form
column10: module:02-n4 jlpt:n4 point:なくて-conjunction complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top10k

column1: 説明がなくて、どうすればいいか分からなかった。
column2: せつめいがなくて、どうすればいいかわからなかった。
column3: There was no explanation so I didn't know what to do.
column6: absence of a noun triggers confusion or inability
column8: Noun + がなくて = because there was no ~; often followed by困る・分からない
column10: module:02-n4 jlpt:n4 point:なくて-conjunction complexity:standard frequency:top5k source:shin-kanzen source:authored frequency:top10k
